hooks.command: $input = $null; $lines = @(); while ($null -ne ($line = [Console]::In.ReadLine())) { $lines += $line }; $json = $lines -join "`n"; try { $obj = $json | ConvertFrom-Json; $fp = if ($obj.tool_input.file_path) { $obj.tool_input.file_path } else { $obj.tool_response.filePath }; $fn = Split-Path $fp -Leaf } catch { $fn = 'files' }; Set-Location 'C:\Users\seonghyeon.baek\Desktop\Claude_Cowork\CLAUDE'; git add -A 2>$null; $status = git status --porcelain 2>$null; if ($status) { git commit -m "auto: $fn 변경사항 저장" 2>$null; git push origin master 2>$null }
